title: Bosch India Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bosch India Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
